'''Vispil''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vispil system/Legends|Vispil system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It refused [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s bribes and fought against him.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2009-08-18 -->''[[The Essential Atlas]]''
